transcripts.q3: I have 4 years of experience working in a daycare center with infants through preschool age children. I've also worked as a preschool teacher assistant and currently I'm pursuing my degree in elementary education.
transcripts.q4: I'm located in Atlanta, Georgia and I'm willing to drive up to 25 miles.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time work around my school schedule. I have classes Monday through Thursday mornings but I'm available afternoons and weekends.
transcripts.q6: When children have conflicts, I first separate them to calm down, then I talk to each child individually to understand what happened. I help them express their feelings and find a solution together.
transcripts.q7: I would be a great Upkid teacher because I genuinely love working with children and I have the experience to handle different age groups and situations. I'm patient, caring, and always put the children's safety first.
